captions.formal: A multi-lane city street in autumn shows heavy traffic flowing past yellow-leaved trees and tall residential buildings under bright sunlight.
captions.sarcastic: Wow, cars driving on a road. Truly groundbreaking urban innovation happening here.
captions.humorous_tech: This traffic loop has been running for hours with zero memory leaks, though the carbon footprint buffer is definitely overflowing.
captions.humorous_non_tech: Rush hour in a city where everyone collectively agreed to forget how to merge nicely.

captions.formal: A small orange kitten walks slowly toward the camera through a shaded path bordered by dense green foliage and tree trunks.
captions.sarcastic: Breaking news: a kitten walks forward. Nature documentaries will never recover from this level of drama.
captions.humorous_tech: Kernel panic averted. This orange fluff successfully compiled a walk.exe with zero segmentation faults.
captions.humorous_non_tech: This kitten is walking toward you like it already knows you have no treats and does not care.

captions.formal: A woman sits at a desk in a modern office, typing on a keyboard in front of a large computer monitor.
captions.sarcastic: Another thrilling episode of someone staring at a screen and pressing buttons. The plants are the real stars here.
captions.humorous_tech: Keyboard input detected, CPU at 100 percent focus, zero bugs reported. This human-machine interface is running smoothly.
captions.humorous_non_tech: She is typing with the intensity of someone who just remembered a deadline exists. The plant in the corner is definitely judging her.
